name: Transurban Group
analysis: TCL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$15.2000. Trade idea: entry A$15.3500, stop A$14.1570, target A$18.9290 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
